message: Dangerous goods require carrier DG acceptance. If carrier DG capability is unknown or no, do not recommend the carrier.
Cargo-aircraft-only cargo requires carrier CAO/freighter capability and station confirmation.
Pharma/temperature-sensitive cargo requires carrier cold-chain product capability.
Perishable cargo requires carrier perishables/fresh-product acceptance and booking confirmation.
Live animal cargo requires explicit carrier live-animal acceptance. Partial or unknown needs manual confirmation.
Valuable/vulnerable cargo requires secure carrier product or station handling confirmation.
Human remains require carrier acceptance and country/station documentation validation.
Heavy/oversized cargo requires carrier heavy cargo/freighter capability plus aircraft fit confirmation.
Carrier-level product capability is not enough; special cargo normally requires station/lane confirmation.
